personal.name: Faqih Alam
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & Machine Learning Enthusiast
personal.bio: I build and ship digital products from scratch to production. Passionate about creating end-to-end solutions and turning ideas into fully functional applications. Electrical Engineering graduate who has a strong interest and growing experience in Machine Learning, IoT, & Full-stack web development.

experiences.title: Full Stack Web Developer
responsibilities: Develop Website using JavaScript, React, Node.js, and related technologies
Providing code reviews and weekly project's report

experiences.title: Service Engineer
responsibilities: Conducted preventive and corrective maintenance on UPS systems at major data centers.
Performed Quarterly Preventive Maintenance at Data Center Indonesia, PT. KCI, PT. Datacomm, PT. PDG.
Performed Startup UPS, battery installation, load testing, and system reliability monitoring.
Performed 600KVA UPS Rotation (Startup/Shutdown) at Data Center Indonesia MM2100.

experiences.title: Research Assistant
responsibilities: Researched industrial automation using PLC ladder diagram programming with Omron CX Programmer and HMI with CX Designer.
Developed IoT systems using Arduino, Raspberry Pi, NodeMCU ESP8266/32 with MQTT & HTTP protocols.
Taught college students about industrial automation, PLC, IoT applications, and Machine Learning.
Created workshops for students on implementing IoT concepts and conducted ML sessions including EDA, feature engineering, model building, evaluation, and deployment.

experiences.title: Network Maintenance Intern
responsibilities: Maintained Metropolitan Area Network (MAN) for internet connectivity.
Fixed and created new network cable routes.

projects.title: Link Hub
projects.description: Satukan semua media sosial, portofolio, dan link penting dalam satu halaman profil yang elegan. Dibuat khusus untuk Kreator, UMKM, dan Profesional.

projects.title: Organic Store
projects.description: A modern, high-performance E-commerce starter kit built with the Next.js App Router, Supabase, and Midtrans. This template features real-time inventory updates, secure authentication, and a seamless checkout flow.

projects.title: Circle App
projects.description: Circle App is Social Media Platform to Share your thought, images & follow your all people you want to know.

projects.title: Smart Journaling
projects.description: Product Goal To create an easy-to-use, AI-powered journaling app to help users journal consistently and provide meaningful insights.

projects.title: Rock-Paper-Scissors (RPS) Classifier
projects.description: The Rock-Paper-Scissors (RPS) project is a comprehensive portfolio piece demonstrating the end-to-end Machine Learning lifecycle—from data preprocessing and training to a live web deployment.
